scenarios.title: Factory Expansion Proposal
scenarios.principle: Dignity of Work and Rights of Workers
scenarios.situation: A manufacturing company proposes building a new factory that would create hundreds of jobs but increase pollution near a working-class neighbourhood.

choices.text: Approve the factory to create jobs
Reject the factory to protect residents

scenarios.title: Refugee Resettlement Request
scenarios.situation: The federal government asks your city to welcome 200 refugees fleeing war. Some residents support the plan while others worry about costs.

scenarios.title: Homeless Shelter Funding
scenarios.principle: Option for the Poor and Vulnerable
scenarios.situation: A charity asks the city to help fund a new homeless shelter downtown. Business leaders worry it may discourage tourism.

scenarios.title: Minimum Wage Debate
scenarios.principle: Dignity of Work and Rights of Workers
scenarios.situation: Worker groups demand the city support raising the local minimum wage. Small businesses warn it could lead to layoffs.

scenarios.title: Police Budget Increase
scenarios.situation: Police leaders request a larger budget to respond to rising crime. Community groups want investment in social programs instead.

scenarios.title: Public Transit Expansion
scenarios.situation: Your city considers expanding public transit to underserved neighbourhoods. The project would improve mobility but cost millions.

scenarios.title: Worker Strike
scenarios.principle: Dignity of Work and Rights of Workers
scenarios.situation: City sanitation workers go on strike demanding better pay and safer conditions. Garbage is piling up across the city.

scenarios.title: Park vs Housing Development
scenarios.situation: Developers want to build housing on a large green space. The project would ease the housing shortage but remove a major park.

scenarios.title: Youth Advisory Council
scenarios.situation: Students ask the city to create a youth advisory council so young people can help influence policy.

scenarios.title: Military Equipment Donation
scenarios.situation: The federal government offers surplus military equipment to local police forces.

scenarios.title: Affordable Housing Project
scenarios.principle: Option for the Poor and Vulnerable
scenarios.situation: A proposal would build affordable housing for low-income families but requires higher city spending.

scenarios.title: Community Garden Initiative
scenarios.situation: Residents propose turning unused land into community gardens.

scenarios.title: Local Business Tax Break
scenarios.situation: Business leaders ask for tax breaks to encourage investment in the city.

scenarios.title: School Funding Debate
scenarios.situation: Teachers request increased school funding for overcrowded classrooms.

scenarios.title: Public Health Clinic
scenarios.situation: Health advocates propose opening a free clinic for low-income residents.

scenarios.title: Water Pollution Crisis
scenarios.situation: Tests show a nearby factory may be polluting the city's river.

scenarios.title: Immigrant Support Services
scenarios.situation: Community groups ask the city to fund language and job training programs for immigrants.

scenarios.title: Public Protest Permit
scenarios.situation: Activists request permission to hold a large protest downtown.

scenarios.title: Food Bank Funding
scenarios.principle: Option for the Poor and Vulnerable
scenarios.situation: Local food banks are struggling with rising demand.

scenarios.title: Bike Lane Expansion
scenarios.situation: Cycling groups want the city to expand bike lanes across downtown.

scenarios.title: Industrial Waste Regulation
scenarios.situation: New regulations could reduce industrial waste but businesses say costs will rise.

scenarios.title: Public Library Expansion
scenarios.situation: Residents want to expand the public library system.

scenarios.title: Senior Care Funding
scenarios.situation: Advocates say senior care homes need additional city funding.

scenarios.title: International Sister City Program
scenarios.situation: Your city is invited to form a partnership with a city in a developing country.

scenarios.title: Community Mediation Program
scenarios.situation: Community leaders propose mediation programs to resolve neighbourhood conflicts.
